---
title: "Test your knowledge"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  freeze: auto
jupyter: python3
format: html
---

# Function to generate fraction problems

```{python}
def gen_fraction_problem():
    numerator = random.randint(1, 9)
    denominator = random.randint(numerator+1, 12)
    amount = random.randint(10, 100)
    answer = (amount / denominator) * numerator
    return numerator, denominator, amount, round(answer, 2)
```

# Generate 4 problems
```{python}
problems = [gen_fraction_problem() for _ in range(4)]

for i, (n, d, amt, ans) in enumerate(problems):
    print(f"{chr(97+i)}) Calculate {n}/{d} of {amt}")
```
